description: Migrate the rich Pages Router screens into the App Router with proper styling via @quant/shared-ui, wired data through apiClient/hooks, and shared types from src/types. This covers inbox, thread, compose (with real EmailComposer), calendar, contacts, repos, pipelines, and security screens. Remove the src/pages/ directory when complete.
steps: Rewrite apps/quantmail/src/app/page.tsx (inbox): Keep the existing AppShell shell but enrich it with the rich features from src/pages/inbox.tsx - category tabs (primary/social/promotions/updates/forums) with unread counts, batch select with toolbar (archive/delete/mark-read), star toggle, search with real onChange handler calling apiClient.searchEmails. Email row click navigates to /thread/[threadId]. Use types from src/types (not local redefinitions). Keep all @quant/shared-ui components. Add empty/error/loading states.

Rewrite apps/quantmail/src/app/thread/[id]/page.tsx: Build a full thread view inspired by src/pages/thread/[id].tsx logic. Show collapsible messages, participants, attachments, reply/forward buttons that actually work (reply opens inline composer or navigates to /compose?replyTo=id). Star/archive/label actions call apiClient methods. Use @quant/shared-ui Card, Avatar, Badge, Button. Import types from src/types.

Rewrite apps/quantmail/src/app/compose/page.tsx: Replace the dead static form with the real EmailComposer component from src/components/EmailComposer.tsx. Wire its onSend to apiClient.composeEmail + apiClient.sendEmail. Wire onSaveDraft to apiClient.composeEmail (as draft). Wire onAIAssist to apiClient.aiCompose. Support URL params (?replyTo=, ?forwardId=) to pre-fill fields. Add success toast on send, error handling.

Build apps/quantmail/src/app/calendar/page.tsx: A real calendar screen with month/week toggle, event list for today, create event form (modal). Wire to apiClient.getEvents, apiClient.getTodayEvents, apiClient.createEvent, apiClient.deleteEvent. Use CalendarGrid component if suitable, otherwise build with @quant/shared-ui Card/Button/Modal. Empty state when no events.

Build apps/quantmail/src/app/contacts/page.tsx: Contact list with search, favorites filter, groups. Wire to apiClient.getContacts, apiClient.createContact, apiClient.updateContact, apiClient.deleteContact. Each contact shows avatar, name, email, tags. Click to view/edit. Add contact button opens modal.

Build apps/quantmail/src/app/repos/page.tsx and apps/quantmail/src/app/repos/[id]/page.tsx: Repos list with visibility badges, star/fork counts. Repo detail shows branches, recent commits, file tree (from apiClient.getFileTree), pull requests list, issues list. Wire to apiClient.getRepos, apiClient.getRepo, apiClient.getBranches, apiClient.getCommits, apiClient.getPullRequests, apiClient.getIssues.

Build apps/quantmail/src/app/pipelines/page.tsx: CI/CD dashboard showing workflows, recent builds with status badges (pass/fail/running), deployments. Wire to apiClient.getWorkflows, apiClient.getBuilds, apiClient.getDeployments. Trigger workflow button, cancel build button.
Build apps/quantmail/src/app/security/page.tsx: Security dashboard with 2FA setup, active sessions, OAuth apps, password change form. Wire setupTwoFactor/enableTwoFactor from apiClient.

Build apps/quantmail/src/app/settings/page.tsx: User settings - profile (display name, avatar), email preferences (signature, auto-reply), notification settings. Use FormField/Input/TextArea/Button from shared-ui.
Delete the entire apps/quantmail/src/pages/ directory (all 13 files). The App Router now has all screens.

Create any missing hooks: apps/quantmail/src/hooks/useThread.ts (wraps apiClient.getThread), apps/quantmail/src/hooks/useCalendar.ts (wraps apiClient.getEvents etc), apps/quantmail/src/hooks/useContacts.ts (wraps apiClient.getContacts etc), apps/quantmail/src/hooks/useRepos.ts (wraps apiClient.getRepos etc), apps/quantmail/src/hooks/usePipelines.ts (wraps apiClient.getWorkflows/getBuilds etc).
Ensure NO local type redefinitions exist - all screens import Email, EmailThread, etc from ../types or ../../types.
acceptance_criteria: src/pages/ directory is deleted (or empty) - single App Router
Every screen uses @quant/shared-ui components (no undefined CSS classes)
Inbox has category tabs, batch actions, star toggle, working search
Thread view shows messages, supports reply/forward navigation
Compose uses real EmailComposer with working send/draft/AI
Contacts shows list with search/filter, supports CRUD
Repos list + detail view with branches/commits/PRs/issues
No local type redefinitions (grep for 'interface Email {' outside types/)
verification: ls apps/quantmail/src/pages/ fails or is empty
findings: All 14 steps completed. Avatar component uses 'name' prop instead of 'fallback'. Input component type does not support 'datetime-local' so native HTML input used for date fields. apiClient.createEvent has a type intersection issue (Date & string) requiring a cast. All typecheck and tests pass (246 tests). Prettier reformatted files on commit.
